---
title: "02 - ARIMA Example on Power Signal"
format: pdf
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Objective

Fit an ARIMA model to a manufacturing power signal and inspect diagnostics.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(forecast)
```

## Simulated power time series

```{r}
set.seed(123)

n <- 500
trend <- seq(0, 8, length.out = n)
season <- 2 * sin(2 * pi * (1:n) / 50)
noise <- arima.sim(model = list(ar = 0.6, ma = -0.3), n = n, sd = 1.2)

power_ts <- ts(40 + trend + season + noise, frequency = 50)
```

## Fit and evaluate ARIMA

```{r}
fit <- auto.arima(power_ts, seasonal = TRUE, stepwise = FALSE, approximation = FALSE)

fc <- forecast(fit, h = 20)

res_diag <- checkresiduals(fit, plot = FALSE)

list(
  model = fit,
  forecast = fc,
  residual_diagnostics = res_diag
)
